evals.name: minimal-conversion
evals.prompt:
I have a pair of MSDIAL alignment TSVs from the RIKEN lipidomics handson dataset:
  /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forMTD.tsv
  /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forSMLSMF.tsv
Convert them into a valid mzTab-M file at /tmp/eval_runs/eval-0/output/result.mztab. The pymzTab-m in-memory validator must report ZERO ERROR-level messages. I don't have any extra study metadata to add — just use the defaults.
evals.expected_output: An mzTab-M file at /tmp/eval_runs/eval-0/output/result.mztab that, when validated via MzTabM.validate, produces 0 ERROR messages.

evals.name: with-study-metadata
evals.prompt:
Convert these RIKEN lipidomics TSVs into mzTab-M:
  MTD:    /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forMTD.tsv
  SMLSMF: /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forSMLSMF.tsv
Write the result to /tmp/eval_runs/eval-1/output/study.mztab.

Study metadata:
- mzTab-ID: RIKEN-LIPIDOMICS-MOUSE-ADRENAL
- Title: Mouse adrenal gland lipidomics (fads2 vs WT)
- Description: Comparative lipidomics of fads2-knockout and wild-type C57BL/6J mouse adrenal glands using MSDIAL alignment
- Contact: Kozo Nishida, RIKEN, knishida@riken.jp
- Instrument: Q Exactive HF (MS:1002416), ESI source, orbitrap analyzer, inductive detector
- Software: MS-DIAL version 4.90
- ms_run files at file:///riken/{name}.mzML
- Polarity: positive

Must pass mzTab-M validation (0 ERROR messages from the in-memory validator).
evals.expected_output: Validated mzTab-M at /tmp/eval_runs/eval-1/output/study.mztab carrying the supplied study metadata in the MTD section.

evals.name: include-blank-with-publication
evals.prompt:
Build an mzTab-M from /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forMTD.tsv and /tmp/riken_lipidomics/1_Mouse_Adrenal_gland_1_forSMLSMF.tsv. Save it to /tmp/eval_runs/eval-2/output/with_blank.mztab.

Keep the Blank-category sample columns (do NOT drop them). Add a publication entry with PubMed ID 29039908 and DOI 10.1021/acs.analchem.7b03576. Validation must succeed (0 ERROR messages from the pymzTab-m in-memory validator).
evals.expected_output: mzTab-M with the Blank columns retained as samples and a publication entry referencing pubmed:29039908 / doi:10.1021/acs.analchem.7b03576.
